# Arthur A. Sabintsev

> Physicist, engineer, and two-time founder. Co-founder of Grove, the team behind Pocket Network. Founder of Gold Ranger Ventures. Took the POKT token past a $1B+ market cap. Contact: arthur@sabintsev.com.

## About
Arthur Ariel Sabintsev is a physicist turned engineer turned founder. He co-founded [Grove](https://grove.city), the team behind [Pocket Network](https://pocket.network), the decentralized network where machines pay machines for blockchain access billions of times a month, and helped take its token (POKT) past a $1B+ market cap. He also founded [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz), his consulting and venture studio, where he advises AI, crypto, and mobile founders, takes fractional COO/CTO roles, and incubates his own projects.

## Building
- [Grove](https://grove.city) (CEO)

## Tinkering
- [Gold Ranger Ventures](https://goldranger.xyz) (Founder — consulting & venture studio; advisory, fractional COO/CTO, and incubations)
- [Jewish Mythology](https://jewishmythology.com) (Currently incubating — AI-searchable reference library for Jewish mythological texts)
- [Commander Spellbook](https://commanderspellbook.com) (Incubated and sold, 2020–2021 — combo search engine for Magic: The Gathering)

## Previously
- [Pocket Network](https://pocket.network) (2018–2026)
- [Capital One](https://capitalone.com) (2018–2022, Head of Mobile Payments)
- [Washington Post](https://washingtonpost.com) (2015–2018, Head of Mobile Engineering)
- [ID.me](https://id.me) (2013–2015)
